Method.desc: Start ImeControl with optional user configuration.
Method.doc:
Start ImeControl with optional user configuration.

Parameters:
 * userConfig - Optional table with sources, appRules, and behavior settings

Returns:
 * The ImeControl object
Method.name: start

Method.desc: Stop ImeControl and clean up all resources.
Method.doc:
Stop ImeControl and clean up all resources including watchers, hotkeys, and timers.

Returns:
 * The ImeControl object
Method.name: stop

Method.doc:
Bind hotkeys for IME control such as toggle and debug.

Parameters:
 * map - A table with optional keys:
   * toggle - {mods, key} to toggle between eng and jpn
   * debug - {mods, key} to show debug info

Returns:
 * The ImeControl object
Method.name: bindHotkeys

Variable.desc: Default configuration table with sources, appRules, and behavior settings.
Variable.doc: Default configuration table with sources, appRules, and behavior settings. Can be customized via the userConfig parameter in start().
Variable.name: _defaultConfig

doc: Robust IME (Input Method Editor) switching for macOS. Provides reliable switching between English and CJK input methods with app-based auto-switching, system recovery, and optional hotkey support.
name: ImeControl
